content.subject: fix(ci): pin golangci-lint v2.1 to support Go 1.26
content.summary:
pin golangci-lint v2.1 to support Go 1.26. The default version (v1.64.8) was built with Go 1.24 and cannot
analyze Go 1.26 code.
